subtopics: Need for measurement, Units of measurement, Systems of units
key_concepts: SI units (fundamental and derived), Significant figures, Uncertainty in result, Dimensions of physical quantities, Dimensional analysis and applications

subtopics: Frame of reference, Motion description using differentiation and integration
key_concepts: Uniform and non-uniform motion, Average speed/velocity, Instantaneous velocity, Uniformly accelerated motion, Velocity-time and position-time graphs, Relations for uniformly accelerated motion (graphical/calculus)

subtopics: Vector quantities and operations, Motion types in plane
key_concepts: Scalar/Vector quantities, Position/displacement vectors, Vector addition/subtraction/multiplication, Rectangular components, Scalar and Vector products, Projectile motion, Uniform circular motion

subtopics: Newton's Laws, Momentum and Impulse, Friction
key_concepts: Force, Inertia, Newton's 1st/2nd/3rd laws, Conservation of linear momentum, Equilibrium of concurrent forces, Static/Kinetic/Rolling friction, Lubrication, Centripetal force (circular motion examples)

subtopics: Work done by forces, Energy forms, Collisions
key_concepts: Work (constant/variable force), Kinetic energy, Work-energy theorem, Power, Potential energy (spring), Conservative and non-conservative forces, Motion in vertical circle, Elastic and Inelastic collisions

chapters.source_chapter_name: System of Particles and Rotational Motion
subtopics: Center of mass, Torque and Angular momentum, Rigid body rotation
key_concepts: CM of particle system/rigid body/rod, Conservation of CM motion, Moment of force (Torque), Angular momentum and conservation, Equilibrium of rigid bodies, Rotational equations of motion, Linear vs Rotational comparison, Moment of inertia, Radius of gyration

subtopics: Planetary motion, Universal gravitation, Gravity variations
key_concepts: Kepler's laws, Universal law of gravitation, Acceleration due to gravity (altitude/depth), Gravitational potential energy and potential, Escape speed, Orbital velocity, Energy of orbiting satellite
Hooke's law, Young’s modulus, Bulk modulus, Shear modulus (qualitative), Poisson's ratio, Elastic energy, Applications of elastic behavior (qualitative)

subtopics: Fluid pressure and flow, Surface phenomena
key_concepts: Pressure due to fluid column, Pascal's law (hydraulic lift/brakes), Viscosity, Stokes' law, Terminal velocity, Streamline/Turbulent flow, Bernoulli's theorem (Torricelli/Dynamic lift), Surface tension and energy, Angle of contact, Excess pressure in curved surfaces

Thermal expansion (solids/liquids/gases), Anomalous expansion of water, Specific heat capacity (Cp/Cv), Calorimetry, Change of state/Latent heat, Conduction/Convection/Radiation, Thermal conductivity, Blackbody radiation concepts
Thermal equilibrium/Zeroth law, Heat/Work/Internal energy, First and Second laws, State variables/EOS, Isothermal/Adiabatic/Reversible/Irreversible/Cyclic processes

Equation of state, Work done in compression, Kinetic assumptions/Pressure concept, Temperature interpretation/RMS speed, Degrees of freedom, Law of equipartition (statement), Specific heat capacities, Mean free path, Avogadro's number
Time period, Frequency, Displacement function, Periodic functions, Simple Harmonic Motion (S.H.M), Uniform circular motion relation to S.H.M
